AgendaSettings.CreationSecondStep.online: Online events can be associated with physical locations
AgendaSettings.CreationSecondStep.status: Show status field (complete, postponed, cancelled) in the form
The state of the event can also be modified from the administration of the agenda
AgendaSettings.contribution.closedContib: The agenda does not accept new contributions
AgendaSettings.contribution.openContribu: Any user can add events, under your moderation
AgendaSettings.contribution.reducedContr: Only invited users can add events
